title: Has / Have
tagline: मेरे पास है, उसके पास है — और बहुत कुछ!
summary: Has और Have दो ऐसे verbs हैं जो English में बहुत ज़्यादा use होते हैं। Possession (मेरे पास है), Present Perfect tense (मैंने किया है), और common expressions (have breakfast, have a meeting) — सब में ये use होते हैं। Rule simple है: I/You/We/They → HAVE, He/She/It → HAS। आज इसे perfectly master करेंगे।
hindiSummary: Hindi में 'मेरे पास कार है' को English में 'I have a car' कहते हैं। 'उसके पास पैसे हैं' = 'She has money.' 'क्या तुम्हारे पास pen है?' = 'Do you have a pen?' यह daily conversation में सबसे ज़्यादा use होने वाली grammar है। इसके साथ Present Perfect tense बनता है जो बहुत important है।
whatYouWillLearn: I have / You have / We have / They have
He has / She has / It has
Possession: 'I have a laptop.' / 'She has a cat.'
Present Perfect: 'I have eaten.' / 'He has gone.'
Negative possession: 'I don't have a car.' / 'She doesn't have time.'
Negative perfect: 'I haven't finished.' / 'He hasn't arrived.'
Have + object + V3: 'I have my work done.'
Common errors (He have, She don't has)
whyImportant: Have/Has के बिना English impossible है। यह possession, Present Perfect tense, और बहुत सारे idioms में use होता है। Interview में 'I have 5 years of experience' — यही grammar है। Professional life में हर moment यही grammar use होती है।
realLifeUsage: Interview: 'I have 5 years of experience in Java development.'
Office: 'Do you have the report ready?' / 'I have sent the email.'
Daily: 'Have you had your lunch?' / 'I haven't eaten yet.'
Doctor: 'Do you have any allergies?' / 'I have been feeling unwell.'
Phone: 'I have a missed call from you.' / 'Do you have a minute?'
Shopping: 'Do you have this in size M?' / 'I have already paid.'
Travel: 'I have my tickets ready.' / 'Do you have your passport?'
Email: 'I have attached the document.' / 'Has she received the mail?'
Home: 'We have guests coming tonight.' / 'Do you have enough food?'
Meeting: 'I have a meeting at 3 PM.' / 'She has already presented.'

dailyGoal.morning: Learn have/has rules and all expressions — 30 min
dailyGoal.evening: Make sentences about your possessions and experiences — 20 min
dailyGoal.night: Write 10 sentences about what you have done today (Present Perfect) — 15 min

motivationalQuote: You have everything you need. You have the will, the dedication, and now you have the grammar too! Keep going!

practiceTarget.speakingTarget: Describe 10 things you have and 10 things you have done today
practiceTarget.writingTarget: Write your professional profile using have/has
